name: Meta Compliance Checker
description: Validate meta titles and descriptions against SEO constraints: title max length (default 60), description min/max length (150-160), keyword presence from SEO plan head_terms, and cross-entity duplicate detection. Configurable pass threshold allows partial failures.
usage_notes: Run after content-writer and seo-planner. Checks meta title length, meta description length, keyword presence, truncation indicators, and cross-entity duplicate meta. Set pass_threshold below 1.0 to allow partial failures.

options.name: title_max_length
options.label: Max meta title length
options.description: Maximum characters for meta title. Google typically truncates at 60.

options.name: description_min_length
options.label: Min meta description length
options.description: Minimum characters for meta description. Below this loses SEO value.

options.name: description_max_length
options.label: Max meta description length
options.description: Maximum characters for meta description. Google typically truncates at 160.

options.name: require_keyword_in_title
options.label: Require keyword in title
options.description: Fail if no head_term from the SEO plan appears in the meta title.

options.name: require_keyword_in_description
options.label: Require keyword in description
options.description: Fail if no head_term from the SEO plan appears in the meta description.

options.name: pass_threshold
options.label: Pass threshold
options.description: Fraction of checks that must pass for the entity to get qa_pass: true. 1.0 means all checks must pass.
